meta_title: Create Course Website Online in 5 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Create a course website with AI in 5 minutes. List programs, prices, accept applications. No code or agency. Try Promto free.
h1: Create Course Website Online in 5 Minutes
og_description: AI will create a course website in 5 minutes: programs, prices, enrollment form. No code or developer. Try Promto.
hero_title: Create Course Website Online in 5 Minutes
hero_subtitle: Describe your courses — AI will create a site with catalog and enrollment form for students.
hero_placeholder: Describe what website you need for your business...

advantages.title: Program Catalog
advantages.description: Create course cards with program, schedule, prices, and description — students see everything in one place.

advantages.title: Ready in 5 Minutes
advantages.description: Describe the topic and format of courses — AI instantly creates a site without programming or a designer.

advantages.title: Course Enrollment
advantages.description: Built-in enrollment form collects student applications — you get contacts and start working.

advantages.title: Search Visibility
advantages.description: Site is optimized for queries like "courses + topic" — students find you through Google and Yandex.

advantages.title: Grows With You
advantages.description: Add new courses, change prices, update programs — the site updates in real time.

advantages.title: Easy Editing
advantages.description: Edit texts, add images, change information without programming skills.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Courses
how_it_works.description: Tell about training directions, format (online/offline), duration, and target audience.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Site
how_it_works.description: System generates a site with course catalog, program cards, and enrollment form for students.

how_it_works.title: Fill in Programs
how_it_works.description: Add course descriptions, modules, teachers, and prices — students will see the full picture.

how_it_works.title: Accept Applications
how_it_works.description: Publish the site and share the link — start receiving applications from new students.

faq.question: Can I add multiple course directions on one site?
faq.answer: Yes. The catalog supports any number of directions and courses within each — structure as you like.

faq.question: Is there an option to add student reviews?
faq.answer: Yes. A reviews section increases trust and conversion. Add screenshots, videos, or text reviews.

faq.question: Can I list course instructors?
faq.answer: Yes. Add a section with instructor information: photo, experience, student achievements under their guidance.

faq.question: Is the site suitable for programming courses?
faq.answer: Yes. Describe languages and technologies, format (intensive, basic course), duration — AI adapts the presentation for IT direction.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. You describe your business, and the system creates a ready site with texts, structure, and design in minutes.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a course website?
faq.answer: You can create a basic site for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain, analytics, and additional integrations.

cta_mid_subtitle: Create a course website in 5 minutes and start accepting applications from students.
cta_final_title: Your Course Website is Ready to Launch
cta_final_subtitle: AI will create a catalog with programs and enrollment. Free, no code, in 5 minutes.
